metadata.author: Luke
metadata.subject: The Gospel of the Forgiveness of Sins — Proclaiming That Jesus Christ Is the Man-Savior.

2: For today a Savior has been born to you in the city of David, who is Christ the Lord.
15: But while he was still a long way off, his father saw him and was moved with compassion, and ran and fell on his neck and kissed him affectionately.
24: And that repentance for forgiveness of sins should be proclaimed in His name to all the nations, beginning from Jerusalem.

20.text: The father running to meet the prodigal son shows the eagerness of God the Father to receive and forgive the returning sinner.
